enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, Colorado on March 19, 2016, recounting a severe headache the day before that caused vomiting. He discusses his plans for the week including a Laser Class America cycling/racing project, and a new audiobook/Kindle publishing project where he is recording books chapter by chapter for upload to ACX.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: describes it as the worst pain he has ever felt in his head, unusual enough that it caused vomiting
planning to attempt it, estimates needing to average 200+ miles per day over roughly a week
actively excited and working on it, recording books chapter by chapter for ACX distribution
currently focused on creating a series of Native American themed books
